core_arc: Child experiences a special day — birthday, first day, or celebration.

personalisation_slots.NAME: Child's first name
personalisation_slots.EVENT: The special event — birthday, first day of school, party

scenes.outline: [NAME] woke up. Today was the big day! It was [EVENT]!
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] waking up excitedly, perhaps jumping out of bed. Bright morning light.

scenes.outline: [NAME] got ready. 'I can't wait!' said [NAME]. Everything felt special today.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] getting dressed or ready, looking happy and excited.
[FRIEND] arriving, perhaps with a card or small gift. Both smiling.

scenes.outline: There was a [SPECIAL_THING]! [NAME] could not believe it. 'Wow!' said [NAME].
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] seeing the [SPECIAL_THING], amazed expression. [FRIEND] watching happily.

scenes.outline: [NAME] and [FRIEND] had so much fun. They played and laughed all day.
There was cake to eat. It was yummy. [NAME] shared it with everyone.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] with a cake, sharing with [FRIEND] and perhaps others.

scenes.outline: The day was almost over. 'This was the best day ever,' said [NAME].
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] looking content, perhaps sitting with [FRIEND], day ending.

scenes.outline: [NAME] went to bed tired but happy. It had been a perfect day.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] in bed, sleepy smile, perhaps holding a memento from the day.

comprehension_questions.inference: How do you think [NAME] felt when they saw the [SPECIAL_THING]?
comprehension_questions.prediction: What special day would you like to have?

writing_worksheet.level_1_2: Trace and write: b, d, y. Copy the word: day.
writing_worksheet.level_3_4: Write these words from the story: special, happy, celebrate. Write about your best day.
writing_worksheet.level_5_6: Write 2 sentences about [NAME]'s special day. What makes a day special?

dinosaurs.flavour_detail: The cake had a big dinosaur on top.

space.flavour_detail: The balloon looked like it could fly to space.

unicorns.flavour_detail: The piñata was full of sweets.

football.flavour_detail: The ball was shiny and new.

baking.flavour_detail: The set had everything to make cakes.

nature.flavour_detail: The kit had a net and a jar.

vehicles.flavour_detail: The train went around a track.

art.flavour_detail: There were paints and brushes and paper.
